meaning: 锡拉库扎[意大利西西里岛东南岸港市]
examples: I want you to move to a villa near Siracusa... right now.
Most pictures were photographed in the coastal cities of Siracusa and Ortigia.
Now then according to Patton's plan, I would attack Siracusa here and he would attack Palermo up here.
Siracusa pleaded guilty to bad check charges and agreed to make good on the checks.
Town after town, Ragusa Ibla, Siracusa, Noto, Modica, offers World Heritage-protected loveliness, so much so that you fear an imminent bout of Paradise Syndrome.
